Title: Supplier onboarding with KYC/AML check
Description: As a supplier, I want to register on the platform and complete a KYC check so that I can participate in procure-to-pay activities.
AcceptanceCriteria:
• Given a new supplier, when they submit registration with business details and documents, then a KYC record is created with status 'Pending'.
• Given a submitted KYC, when an admin approves it, then the supplier status becomes 'Verified'.
• Given a verified supplier, when they log in, then they see their verified badge.
Notes: Manual KYC approval in MVP; document upload only.

Title: Role-based access and user management
Description: As a platform admin, I want to assign roles (SME, Buyer, Bank) to users so that they see appropriate dashboards and permissions.
AcceptanceCriteria:
• Given an admin user, when they create a new user, they can select a role from SME, Buyer, Bank.
• Given a user with role SME, when they log in, they see only SME functions (e.g., submit invoice).
• Given a user with role Buyer, when they log in, they see procurement functions (create PO, approve delivery).
Notes: Simple role enum; no fine-grained permissions.

Title: Procure-to-pay workflow: Create and approve purchase order
Description: As a buyer, I want to create a purchase order and have the supplier accept it, so that the procurement process begins.
AcceptanceCriteria:
• Given a buyer, when they create a PO with supplier, items, and value, then the PO is stored with status 'Pending Supplier Acceptance'.
• Given a PO with status 'Pending', when the supplier views it and clicks Accept, then the PO status changes to 'Accepted'.
• Given an accepted PO, when the supplier delivers goods, they can mark it as 'Delivered'.

Title: Invoice submission and approval
Description: As a supplier, I want to submit an invoice for a delivered PO so that I can get paid.
AcceptanceCriteria:
• Given a PO marked 'Delivered', when the supplier uploads an invoice, then the invoice is created with status 'Pending Buyer Approval'.
• Given an invoice, when the buyer approves it, then the invoice status changes to 'Approved'.
• Given an approved invoice, the system records the amount due.
Notes: No payment execution in MVP; just status.

Title: Basic PLS profit/loss calculation and recording
Description: As a bank, I want to record a PLS contract and compute profit/loss for a financing so that the Shariah-compliant distribution is tracked.
AcceptanceCriteria:
• Given a PLS contract created with parameters (profit ratio, capital amounts), when an invoice is settled, the system calculates profit share according to the ADR-2026-001 formula.
• Given a calculated profit, the system records it in the audit trail with contract ID, amounts, and timestamp.

Title: Immutable audit trail for procure-to-pay events
Description: As an auditor, I want every key event (PO, delivery, invoice, approval) to be recorded with a hash anchored to an immutable store so that the log cannot be tampered with.
AcceptanceCriteria:
• Given any PO creation, when it is saved, the system generates a hash of the event data and stores it in the audit log with timestamp.
• Given a delivery event, when recorded, its hash is anchored using the method defined in ADR-2026-002.
• Given an auditor request, the system can export a signed bundle of events with their hashes for verification.
Dependencies: Implements hybrid anchoring as per spike.

Title: Audit report export for regulators
Description: As a regulator, I want to request and receive an export of all relevant transactions for a given period so that I can perform compliance checks.
AcceptanceCriteria:
• Given a regulator user, when they select a date range and request export, the system generates a CSV file with all events (POs, deliveries, invoices, PLS records) and their hashes.
• The export includes a digital signature to verify authenticity.

Title: Shariah governance workflow (manual approval)
Description: As a Shariah Board member, I want to review and approve new PLS products before they are used, so that compliance is ensured.
AcceptanceCriteria:
• Given a new PLS contract template, when it is submitted for approval, a task is created for the Shariah Board.
• Given a Shariah Board member, they can view the contract details and mark it as 'Approved' or 'Rejected'.
• Approved contracts are recorded in the system with a reference to the approval.
Dependencies: Manual workflow; no on-chain signatures in MVP.

Title: Role-based dashboards for SMEs, Buyers, Banks
Description: As a user, I want a dashboard tailored to my role showing relevant information and actions.
AcceptanceCriteria:
• Given a logged-in SME, the dashboard shows their open POs, submitted invoices, and PLS contracts (if any).
• Given a buyer, the dashboard shows pending supplier acceptances, invoices to approve, and audit reports.
• Given a bank, the dashboard shows PLS contracts and profit/loss records.

Title: Access logging with non-repudiation
Description: Ensure all user actions that change state are logged with user identity and a cryptographic signature (or hash) to support non-repudiation.
AcceptanceCriteria:
• Given any state-changing API call (create PO, approve invoice), the system logs the user ID, timestamp, and a hash of the action.
• The log is stored in the audit trail and included in exports.
